parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  Body: $json.Body,
  From: $json.From,
  MessageSid: $json.MessageSid,
  channel: $json.channel,
  _relay_sig_ok: true,
  _relay_validated_at: $json._relay_validated_at,
  _relay_version: $json._relay_version,
  _relay_hmac: $json._relay_hmac,
  _format_valid: $json._format_valid,
  _suspicion_score: $json._suspicion_score,
  timestamp: $json.timestamp
}) }}
